• Provides a full‑screen canvas game with mobile controls, UI overlays, and custom modals.
  • Implements procedural map generation, mining, building, explosives, and a minimap.
  • Includes sound manager, texture engine, save system, and admin/host handling for multiplayer.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Sound.playSound('build');

This HTML page creates “Mega Miner NG”, a tile‑based mining game with both single‑player and multiplayer support. It handles player input, rendering, sound, saves, and networking while offering a customizable UI and touch‑friendly mobile controls.
